summary.intent: Evaluate a community-contributed Arch Linux PKGBUILD from a GitHub discussion and decide whether to change the project's Arch packaging approach, then document a plan to publish moltis to AUR.
summary.outcome: A structured AUR publishing plan was written to plans/2026-04-14-plan-aur-publishing.md and committed to the lydian-repair branch, which was then merged to main.

repo: CI builds .pkg.tar.zst packages for x86_64 and aarch64 on every release tag via a build-arch job in .github/workflows/release.yml (lines 454-561)
Arch packages are installed via install.sh --method=arch pulling from GitHub Releases, not AUR
pkg/arch/PKGBUILD exists as a local template but lacks optdepends, proper pkgver(), and WASM/Tailwind build steps
Web and WASM assets are laid out at /usr/share/moltis/web/ and /usr/share/moltis/wasm/, consistent with DEB/RPM packaging

code.finding: Full Arch Linux package build job: builds .pkg.tar.zst for x86_64 and aarch64 on release tags
Existing PKGBUILD template is minimal; missing optdepends (docker/podman, nodejs, chromium, tmux), pkgver(), and WASM/Tailwind build steps that the community contributor's version includes

workflow: AUR registration requires running a pacman command as CAPTCHA, which blocks registration without an Arch Linux environment
moltis-bin AUR variant (installs pre-built binaries from GitHub Releases) is lower maintenance than moltis-git and can be automated via KSXGitHub/github-actions-deploy-aur
Plans are stored in plans/ directory with date-prefixed filenames

friction: AUR account registration requires an Arch Linux box for the pacman CAPTCHA — user does not currently have one, blocking AUR publishing
open_items: Publish moltis-bin to AUR once an Arch Linux environment is available (docker run -it archlinux is sufficient)
Automate AUR updates in CI using KSXGitHub/github-actions-deploy-aur after the build-arch job
Update pkg/arch/PKGBUILD with optdepends, proper pkgver(), and WASM/Tailwind build steps from the community contributor's PKGBUILD
Optionally publish moltis-git to AUR if there is user demand for source builds
Thank the contributor at discussion #679 and point them to existing pre-built packages
